hero.slide2_subtitle: Leveraging National Research Platforms for Mine Safety

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Beijing Dingtai Ancai Mine Water Hazard Prevention Research Institute focuses on frontier research in DAS, geophysical inversion, directional drilling and regional water-hazard treatment.
about.card1_desc: Providing technical R&D, consulting, and engineering services in mine water hazard prevention for coal mining enterprises worldwide, committed to becoming a leading high-level technology service enterprise in the field.
about.card2_desc: Driven by technological innovation to ensure mine safety. Building a professional research institute with leading technology and outstanding reputation in mine water hazard prevention.
about.card3_desc: Core team members have studied under renowned experts in China's mine water hazard prevention field, maintain close academic ties with CUMT, CUMTB and other leading institutions.

research.title: Research Directions
research.subtitle: Focusing on key technologies for deep mine water hazard prevention and systematic engineering applications
research.dir1: Deep Seam Floor Mining-Induced Failure Dynamics
research.dir1_desc: Investigating dynamic evolution of floor rock fracture distribution under deep mining conditions and coupled stress-seepage disaster mechanisms.
research.dir2_desc: Developing modified water inrush coefficient methods and seepage-conversion evaluation for precise prediction of deep mine floor water inrush risk.
research.dir3: Mine Water Hazard Monitoring & Early Warning
research.dir3_desc: Developing key monitoring and early warning technologies and equipment, establishing 3D visualization analysis systems for mine water filling conditions.
research.dir4_desc: Research on grouting treatment, dewatering, curtain interception and other prevention technologies, providing full-process services from design to construction guidance.

team.title: Expert Team
team.subtitle: Supported by senior advisors, chief scientist and a cross-university expert pool

partners.title: Academic Collaboration Network
partners.subtitle: Maintaining close academic partnerships with renowned universities and research institutions

about.overview_content:
Beijing Dingtai Ancai Mine Water Hazard Prevention Research Institute focuses on deep mining water hazards under high-pressure aquifers, complex structures, strong mining disturbance and concealed conductive pathways, building a research platform integrating scientific research, field verification and engineering translation.

The institute focuses on DAS distributed fiber-optic wavefield monitoring, high-resolution 3D seismic interpretation, mine electrical and TEM detection, multi-source geophysical inversion, hydrogeological numerical modeling, surface directional multilateral drilling and regional pre-treatment.

It turns field problems into research questions and engineering data into reusable technical systems, supporting risk identification, transparent geological modeling, treatment scheme design, construction consulting and effectiveness verification for coal mines, metal mines and complex underground engineering.
about.team_intro: The team combines senior advisors, a chief scientist and a cross-university expert pool, covering mine management, research, field engineering and technical training.

hu_yanbo.name: Hu Yanbo
hu_yanbo.title: Chief Scientist and Technical Advisor
hu_yanbo.bio:
Associate professor and director of a mine water hazard prevention and water resources research center. Ph.D. from China University of Mining and Technology; postdoctoral researcher jointly trained by CUMTB and CHN Energy.

His research covers DAS seismic wavefields, regional treatment of deep limestone aquifers, verification of high-pressure water control and goaf subsidence treatment. He has led or participated in 50+ mine water projects, published 20+ SCI papers, obtained 10+ granted invention patents and authored one monograph.

wang_huiming.name: Wang Huiming
wang_huiming.title: Senior Advisor for Energy and Mining Strategy
wang_huiming.bio:
Ph.D. in Engineering, professor-level senior engineer and senior political engineer. Council member of China Coal Society and guest mentor at CUMT School of Management and Fudan University School of Management.

He has long served in energy and mining leadership roles, including senior positions at Xuzhou Mining Group, Sanhejian Coal Mine, Jiangsu Huamei Engineering Construction Group, Jiangsu Mining Engineering Group and China Huadian's coal industry management system.

His strengths cover group governance, major project organization, mine operation management and risk control. He is the author of 'Confucian Culture and Contemporary Chinese Management' and related works.

research.title: Research & Innovation
research.subtitle: Systematic research and engineering applications in mine water hazard prevention core technologies

services.title: Technical Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive mine water hazard prevention solutions for coal mining enterprises
services.consulting_desc: Providing professional consulting services including technical scheme evaluation, hydrogeological condition analysis, and water prevention technology planning for coal mining enterprises.
services.assessment_desc: Conducting specialized assessments including mine water inrush risk evaluation, water inrush coefficient calculation, floor failure depth prediction, and mine water inflow prediction.
services.engineering_desc: Providing full-process technical services from design to construction guidance and effectiveness verification for grouting, dewatering, curtain interception and other prevention engineering works.

academic.title: Academic Committee
academic.subtitle: Academic Guidance · Innovation Driven
academic.intro: Scientific research and engineering practice require high-level academic guidance. The institute attaches great importance to the development of its academic committee, committed to building an open, collaborative, and rigorous academic governance system.
academic.plan: The institute plans to establish an Academic Committee as its highest academic advisory body. The committee will consist of honorary directors, committee chairs, and members, and will invite authoritative experts in China's mine water hazard prevention field to provide academic guidance.
academic.network_intro: Leveraging the expert team's academic backgrounds and industry connections, the institute maintains close collaboration with the following academic institutions and research platforms:
institutions: School of Resources and Geosciences, China University of Mining and Technology
School of Geoscience and Surveying Engineering, China University of Mining and Technology (Beijing)
National Engineering Research Center for Coal Mine Water Hazard Prevention (in communication)
Key Laboratory of Mining Area Geology and Disaster Advanced Detection and Warning, Ministry of Emergency Management
International Mine Water Association (IMWA) China National Committee
